Grid

cssеҗ„з§ҚеҚ•дҪҚ

cssзҡ„зӣёе…іж–№жі•,еҸҳйҮҸ

index

е…ғзҙ зҡ„дҪҚзҪ®

е…ғзҙ зҡ„еӨ§е°ҸиҺ·еҸ–

еј№жҖ§еёғеұҖ(flex)

ж–Үжң¬жҚўиЎҢе’Ңз©әзҷҪз¬Ұ

зҷҫеҲҶеҸ·

иЎЁж јеёғеұҖ

йј ж ҮдҪҚзҪ®

еҪ“еүҚйЎө

е…ғзҙ зҡ„дҪҚзҪ® вҖӢ

API еҜ№жҜ” вҖӢ

APIеҸӮиҖғзі»иҝ”еӣһеҖјеңәжҷҜ
offsetTop/LeftoffsetParentnumberзӣёеҜ№е®ҡдҪҚзҲ¶зә§
clientTop/LeftиҮӘиә«иҫ№жЎҶnumberиҺ·еҸ–иҫ№жЎҶе®ҪеәҰ
scrollLeft/Topж»ҡеҠЁдҪҚзҪ®numberж»ҡеҠЁзӣёе…і
getBoundingClientRect()и§ҶеҸЈDOMRectжңҖеёёз”Ё

getBoundingClientRect() вҖӢ

js
const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();

// дҪҚзҪ®
rect.top      // е…ғзҙ йЎ¶йғЁеҲ°и§ҶеҸЈйЎ¶йғЁзҡ„и·қзҰ»
rect.left     // е…ғзҙ е·Ұдҫ§еҲ°и§ҶеҸЈе·Ұдҫ§зҡ„и·қзҰ»
rect.bottom   // е…ғзҙ еә•йғЁеҲ°и§ҶеҸЈйЎ¶йғЁзҡ„и·қзҰ»
rect.right    // е…ғзҙ еҸідҫ§еҲ°и§ҶеҸЈе·Ұдҫ§зҡ„и·қзҰ»

// е°әеҜё
rect.width    // е…ғзҙ е®ҪеәҰпјҲеҗ« borderпјҢеҗ« paddingпјү
rect.height   // е…ғзҙ й«ҳеәҰ

// дҪҚзҪ® + е°әеҜё
rect.x        // зӯүеҗҢдәҺ left
rect.y        // зӯүеҗҢдәҺ top

еёёи§ҒеңәжҷҜ вҖӢ

1. жЈҖжөӢе…ғзҙ жҳҜеҗҰеңЁи§ҶеҸЈдёӯ вҖӢ

js
function isInViewport(element) {
  const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
  return (
    rect.top >= 0 &&
    rect.left >= 0 &&
    rect.bottom <= window.innerHeight &&
    rect.right <= window.innerWidth
  );
}

// жҲ–пјҡйғЁеҲҶеҸҜи§ҒеҚіеҸҜ
function isPartiallyInViewport(element) {
  const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
  return (
    rect.top < window.innerHeight &&
    rect.bottom > 0 &&
    rect.left < window.innerWidth &&
    rect.right > 0
  );
}

2. е…ғзҙ зӣёеҜ№дәҺж–ҮжЎЈзҡ„дҪҚзҪ® вҖӢ

js
function getDocumentOffset(element) {
  const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
  return {
    top: rect.top + window.scrollY,
    left: rect.left + window.scrollX
  };
}

3. жЈҖжөӢе…ғзҙ жҳҜеҗҰеңЁеҸҰдёҖдёӘе…ғзҙ еҶ… вҖӢ

js
function isInside(container, target) {
  const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
  const targetRect = target.getBoundingClientRect();

  return (
    targetRect.top >= containerRect.top &&
    targetRect.left >= containerRect.left &&
    targetRect.bottom <= containerRect.bottom &&
    targetRect.right <= containerRect.right
  );
}

4. ж»ҡеҠЁеҲ°е…ғзҙ  вҖӢ

js
// еҺҹз”ҹж–№жі•
element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });

// жүӢеҠЁи®Ўз®—
function scrollToElement(element) {
  const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
  const scrollTop = rect.top + window.scrollY - window.innerHeight / 2;
  window.scrollTo({ top: scrollTop, behavior: 'smooth' });
}

5. жӢ–жӢҪе…ғзҙ дҪҚзҪ®и®Ўз®— вҖӢ

js
let isDragging = false;
let startX, startY, initialLeft, initialTop;

element.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
  isDragging = true;
  startX = e.clientX;
  startY = e.clientY;
  const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
  initialLeft = rect.left;
  initialTop = rect.top;
});

document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  if (!isDragging) return;
  const dx = e.clientX - startX;
  const dy = e.clientY - startY;
  element.style.position = 'absolute';
  element.style.left = `${initialLeft + dx}px`;
  element.style.top = `${initialTop + dy}px`;
});

document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
  isDragging = false;
});

6. иҺ·еҸ–йј ж ҮзӣёеҜ№дәҺе…ғзҙ зҡ„дҪҚзҪ® вҖӢ

js
element.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
  const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
  const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
  console.log(`зӮ№еҮ»дҪҚзҪ®пјҡ(${x}, ${y})`);
});

7. еӣәе®ҡе®ҡдҪҚе…ғзҙ пјҲеҗёйЎ¶ж•Ҳжһңпјү вҖӢ

js
const header = document.querySelector('header');
const placeholder = document.createElement('div');
const headerHeight = header.offsetHeight;

function toggleSticky() {
  const rect = header.getBoundingClientRect();
  if (rect.top <= 0 && !header.classList.contains('sticky')) {
    header.classList.add('sticky');
    header.style.position = 'fixed';
    header.style.top = '0';
    placeholder.style.height = `${headerHeight}px`;
    header.parentNode.insertBefore(placeholder, header);
  } else if (rect.top > 0 && header.classList.contains('sticky')) {
    header.classList.remove('sticky');
    header.style.position = '';
    placeholder.remove();
  }
}

window.addEventListener('scroll', toggleSticky);

8. и®Ўз®—дёӨе…ғзҙ д№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„и·қзҰ» вҖӢ

js
function getDistance(el1, el2) {
  const rect1 = el1.getBoundingClientRect();
  const rect2 = el2.getBoundingClientRect();
  const x1 = rect1.left + rect1.width / 2;
  const y1 = rect1.top + rect1.height / 2;
  const x2 = rect2.left + rect2.width / 2;
  const y2 = rect2.top + rect2.height / 2;
  return Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x2 - x1, 2) + Math.pow(y2 - y1, 2));
}

жіЁж„ҸдәӢйЎ№ вҖӢ

  1. getBoundingClientRect() иҝ”еӣһзҡ„еҖјдјҡйҡҸж»ҡеҠЁеҸҳеҢ–
  2. offsetParent еҸҜиғҪжҳҜ nullпјҲе…ғзҙ жҳҜ display: none жҲ– position: fixedпјү
  3. transform дјҡеҪұе“Қ getBoundingClientRect() зҡ„з»“жһң
  4. жҖ§иғҪпјҡйў‘з№ҒиҜ»еҸ–еёғеұҖеұһжҖ§дјҡи§ҰеҸ‘еӣһжөҒпјҢз”Ё requestAnimationFrame дјҳеҢ–

жӣҙж–°ж—Ҙжңҹ:

Pager
дёҠдёҖйЎөindex
дёӢдёҖйЎөе…ғзҙ зҡ„еӨ§е°ҸиҺ·еҸ–
